result.summary: AfterShip exposes three documented developer HTTP APIs—Tracking, Returns, and Shipping—authenticated by API key; Tracking also supports OAuth access tokens.

aftership_api_key.label: AfterShip API key
aftership_api_key.setup: Go to the [API keys page](https://organization.automizely.com/api-keys) and create a new API key for your account/workspace. Use the key as the primary credential for AfterShip REST APIs that require key-based auth.

aftership_oauth_token.label: AfterShip OAuth access token
aftership_oauth_token.setup: Create or register an OAuth app from the AfterShip developer docs, then complete the OAuth flow to mint an access token for your integration. The docs’ OAuth getting-started guide is the entry point for app registration and token acquisition.
